title: Realtime gossip and overlay cache
description:
## Intent
As a contributor, I want realtime gossip and an overlay cache so that collaborators can see changes immediately without weakening Git as the source of truth.

## Definition of Done
- UDS and MQTT transports implemented with identical semantics in Rust and Python.
- Overlay merge and GC behavior implemented and verified.
- CLI commands for gossip and overlay available in both runtimes.
- Documentation updated with realtime guide and references.
- BDD specs green and parity check passes.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
